title: Tag list normalize, dedupe, sort
prompt: You are given a comma-separated list of tags. Produce the canonical tag set:
1. trim leading/trailing whitespace from each tag,
5. join with a single comma and no spaces.
Blue, red, GREEN, blue,  Yellow,red , green
Output the single resulting line between <answer> and </answer> tags, nothing else.
difficulty_rationale: A fixed sequence of string ops with a fully specified output. No judgement. Tests only careful execution of a 5-step recipe; expected high pass at all tiers.
